name: LUXY Ride — Explorer — Touch 1
headline: The ride everyone's talking about but you haven't tried
body: You've optimized every part of your travel. Flights. Hotels. Meetings. But ground transportation? Still stuck in 2019.
rationale: Explorer archetype converts on NOVELTY, not trust or safety. The creative positions LUXY as the missing upgrade in their already-optimized travel stack.

name: LUXY Ride — Explorer — Touch 2
headline: See what a LUXY ride looks like on your route
body: 10 seconds. Enter your airport. See your vehicle, your driver's profile, your exact pickup spot. No booking required.
rationale: Explorers convert fast — 2 touches max. Touch 2 is micro-commitment that creates endowment through preview without requiring action.

name: LUXY Ride — Prevention Planner — Touch 1
headline: Never stress about airport pickup again
body: Flight delayed 3 hours? Your LUXY driver already knows. They track your flight in real-time and adjust automatically. Zero phone calls needed.
rationale: Prevention-framed: what you AVOID, not what you gain. Addresses the core anxiety of the prevention planner — what happens when things go wrong. 99.7% on-time frames as risk elimination.

name: LUXY Ride — Prevention Planner — Touch 2
headline: What happens when your Uber doesn't show up?
body: LUXY backup guarantee: if your assigned driver can't make it, a replacement is dispatched automatically. You'll never be stranded.
rationale: Prevention frame continued: the risk of NOT having LUXY. Evidence is about safety nets and guarantees, not about luxury features.

name: LUXY Ride — Prevention Planner — Touch 3
headline: Your next flight is covered — here's how to make sure
body: Set up your profile once. Add your upcoming flights. LUXY monitors them all and has a driver ready at every landing. Nothing to remember.
rationale: Prevention planners are high conscientiousness — they WANT to plan ahead. Implementation intention framed as 'securing' your travel, not 'booking' a service.

name: LUXY Ride — Reliable Cooperator — Touch 1
headline: How organized travelers handle ground transportation
body: 47,000 executives pre-schedule their LUXY rides alongside their flights. One less thing to coordinate on travel day.
rationale: Reliable Cooperators are planners and cooperators. Social proof from OTHER organized people. Framed as part of their planning workflow, not as a luxury splurge.

name: LUXY Ride — Reliable Cooperator — Touch 2
headline: Tuesday 6am flight? Your LUXY is already booked
body: Sync with your calendar. Every flight gets a pre-assigned driver. Arrives 10 minutes early. Every time. Schedule once, forget forever.
rationale: Implementation intention matched to their planning personality. Calendar sync is the key trigger — these people LIVE by their calendar. Short sequence: 2 touches.
